description: This is a Java source file defining a Spring Boot REST controller named HelloController, which provides several basic API endpoints including welcome, documentation redirect, health check, and application info.

classes.name: HelloController
classes.description: A Spring Boot REST controller providing endpoints for greeting, documentation redirect, health check, and application info.

methods.name: hello
methods.description: Returns a welcome message when accessing the root endpoint.

methods.name: docs
methods.description: Redirects to Swagger UI documentation page, preserving the original request scheme, host, and port.

methods.name: health
methods.description: Returns a simple health status string indicating the application is running.
